title: aphelia drummondii
intro: Aphelia drummondii, also known as the Drummond's rose or Prairie rose, is a flowering plant native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its leaves and flowers. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving digestive issues. Aphelia drummondii can be prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a versatile remedy for various ailments.
